name: 300W LED Linear High Bay Light 5000K AC 120-277V
description: Upgrade your lighting solution with our 3.5ft 300W LED Linear High Bay Light, engineered for performance, durability, and ease of installation. Delivering a crisp 5000K daylight white color temperature and an outstanding efficacy of 140 lumens per watt, this fixture is ideal for large indoor spaces where powerful, energy-efficient illumination is essential. Why Choose This Fixture? Whether you’re upgrading your warehouse lighting or outfitting a new industrial space, our 3.5ft 300W LED Linear High Bay Light provides the brightness, efficiency, and control flexibility you need. With a built-in sensor receptacle port, integrating advanced lighting controls is effortless—saving energy and enhancing convenience.
short_desc: Key Features: High Output Efficiency: 300W of power delivers exceptional brightness—ideal for high bay environments—while maintaining superior energy efficiency at 140 lm/W. Optimal Color Temperature: 5000K daylight white offers clear, natural light for improved visibility and focus in work-intensive areas. Wide Voltage Range: Operates on AC 120-277V, ensuring compatibility with a broad range of electrical systems. Sensor-Ready: Includes a built-in sensor receptacle port for fast, plug-and-play integration with compatible occupancy or daylight sensors, helping reduce energy consumption. Built to Last: Constructed with high-quality materials to withstand demanding commercial and industrial environments. Simple Installation: Designed for hassle-free mounting, making it perfect for retrofits or new construction in high-ceiling areas. Ideal Applications: Warehouses: Brightens large storage areas for improved visibility and safety. Manufacturing Facilities: Ensures consistent lighting where precision and productivity are paramount. Workshops & Garages: Delivers even, shadow-free illumination for task-focused settings. Commercial Venues: Great for gyms, event spaces, retail stores, and other large indoor facilities.
